title: Spring Pasta with Mediterranean Flair
description: A delicious and easy-to-make pasta dish inspired by the Mediterranean, featuring spring vegetables and a hint of herbs.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook linguine according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil over medium heat.
Add thinly sliced spring onions and cook until they start to soften, about 2-3 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for another minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add pitted and sliced olives and cook for 1-2 minutes, until they start to release their juices.
Add dry white wine and cook until the liquid is almost completely reduced, stirring occasionally.
Stir in freshly grated parmesan cheese until melted and well combined.
Add cooked linguine to the skillet and toss with the sauce until the pasta is well coated.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, then garnish with chopped parsley.
